--- gmax1@mindspring.com wrote:

FYI
Sent via BlackBerry from Cingular Wireless

-----Original Message-----
From: LVJET@aol.com
Date: Thu, 6 Jul 2006 15:37:17
To:gmax1@mindspring.com
Subject: schedule

Ghislaine, just a reminder, I told JE that I have
Morrison on vacation today thru Monday, I am having
Dave fly as engineer in Boeing. Sarah said there is
a possible Europe trip this weekend. Once Morrison
comes back on duty Tuesday, I was planning on
vacation for a week at that time, Bill, Dave and
Morrison will cover B727 during my time off, Heading
to Ranch to meet with family, (Actually Telluride
for a spa and massage week for Eileen and I, going
to loose some weight and work out.
let me know schedule when you hear.
thx,
LV
